notes: Manually reviewed v1 target-label decisions for pandas-dev/pandas. Decisions are explicit and human-authored; semantic roles are never inferred from label names. Selection requires semantic predictability from initial issue title/body, at least 30 issues of total support, activity in at least 12 months, and at least 5 issues in the most recent four dataset months. Workflow and post-investigation outcome labels are explicitly excluded because they are not derivable from initial issue text.

default.explanation: Not explicitly reviewed for v1; excluded by the safe default because it lacks demonstrated support as a first-model target.

labels.label: Bug
labels.explanation: Primary issue-type target; predictable from initial title/body and well supported across the dataset.

labels.label: Enhancement
labels.explanation: Feature-request issue type; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Docs
labels.explanation: Documentation area; recognizable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Arrow
labels.explanation: PyArrow-backed component; predictable from initial text and meets support and temporal criteria.

labels.label: Strings
labels.explanation: String dtype/operations component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Indexing
labels.explanation: Indexing/selection component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Missing-data
labels.explanation: Missing-value handling component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: IO CSV
labels.explanation: CSV read/write component; predictable from initial text and meets support and temporal criteria.

labels.label: Numeric Operations
labels.explanation: Numeric/arithmetic operations component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Performance
labels.explanation: Performance-quality dimension often stated explicitly in the initial report; meets support and temporal criteria.

labels.label: Reshaping
labels.explanation: Reshaping/pivot/merge component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Dtype Conversions
labels.explanation: Dtype conversion component; predictable from initial text and meets support and temporal criteria.

labels.label: Build
labels.explanation: Build/packaging infrastructure; recognizable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Datetime
labels.explanation: Datetime/timestamp component; predictable from initial text and well supported.

labels.label: Regression
labels.explanation: Regression issue type; frequently signalled in the initial report, though sometimes confirmed during investigation, hence medium leakage risk.

labels.label: Error Reporting
labels.explanation: Semantically legitimate quality target but only 2 issues in the most recent four dataset months; deferred pending more recent support.

labels.label: Groupby
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but only 4 issues in the most recent four dataset months; deferred pending more recent support.

labels.label: Apply
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: API Design
labels.explanation: Legitimate design concern but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: Deprecate
labels.explanation: Lifecycle label below the 30-issue support threshold; deferred.

labels.label: Index
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: Copy / view semantics
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: IO JSON
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: Window
labels.explanation: Legitimate component but total support is below the 30-issue threshold; deferred.

labels.label: Needs Triage
labels.explanation: Maintainer workflow state, not derivable from the initial issue text; excluded.

labels.label: Needs Discussion
labels.explanation: Maintainer workflow state reflecting process rather than initial-text content; excluded.

labels.label: Closing Candidate
labels.explanation: Outcome reached during triage rather than a property of the initial report; excluded.

labels.label: Needs Info
labels.explanation: Maintainer workflow state requesting more information; not an initial-text target; excluded.

labels.label: Duplicate Report
labels.explanation: Duplicate determination is a post-investigation outcome, not derivable from the initial text; excluded.
